message:
fix(tests): add --sample-size flag to prevent automation_mode test timeouts

Add a --sample-size flag to the `agent plan` command that randomly samples
N processes for inference instead of processing all ~900+ real system
processes. This dramatically reduces test time from timeouts to ~75 seconds.

- Add sample_size: Option<usize> to AgentPlanArgs struct
- Add sampling logic using rand::seq::SliceRandom before inference loop
- Add rand = "0.9" dependency to pt-core/Cargo.toml
- Update 11 automation_mode tests to use --sample-size 50

Closes: process_triage-bfiq

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -29,6 +29,7 @@ libc = "0.2"
 regex = "1"
 sha2 = "0.10"
 hex = "0.4"
+rand = "0.9"
 
 # Structured logging
 tracing = "0.1"
